FDB.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable Bridge
FDB.Settings.Enabled.Hint: Activate the MJ/Jasra dialogue via Discord. The #foundry channel is permanently monitored.
FDB.Settings.ChatMode.Name: Chat visibility mode
FDB.Settings.ChatMode.Hint: How Jasra conversations appear in Foundry (Discord messages always whispered to MJ except in Public mode)
FDB.ConfigMenu.Name: Foundry-Discord Bridge Configuration
FDB.ConfigMenu.Label: Configure Bridge
FDB.ConfigMenu.Hint: Set Discord token, server ID, channel ID, and webhook URL
FDB.Settings.Token.Name: Discord Bot Token
FDB.Settings.Token.Hint: Discord bot token to listen to messages (visible only to the GM)
FDB.Settings.GuildId.Name: Discord Server ID
FDB.Settings.ChannelId.Name: Discord Channel ID
FDB.Settings.ChannelId.Hint: Channel to listen to, or pick from the dropdown below
FDB.Settings.WebhookUrl.Name: Discord Webhook URL
FDB.Settings.WebhookUrl.Hint: Webhook URL to send messages from Foundry → Discord
FDB.Settings.Debug.Name: Debug mode
FDB.Settings.Debug.Hint: Show detailed logs in the console (F12)
